confidence: confirmed (live read-watch in level 0 + disassembly of the caught reader PCs)
method: Drove controller input (trace_play.lua plan) into level 0 (verified $1EEA=0 with the scanned pointer block live: D9=$A86B DB=$A600 80x24 obj=$8DAE), then set ROM read callbacks on the level's object list / attribute table / tilemap and recorded which PC reads which byte offset.

tilemap_cell.note: LDA ($16) loads the cell, then AND #$7FFF masks bit 15 before using it as a tileset byte offset

tile_attribute.note: indexed by (tile_word & 0x3FF) -> 1 byte per SNES tile character (collision/property)

object_record.note: copies the 22-byte record into DP $3B..$50 via ($16),Y, then interprets fields at $80:E9CB+
